evidence.excerpt: Document Dow Release 1 59 64634 711 5612 7 2852 MEMORANDUM Tos Mr. A rong Paul Nitze asked me what the Air Force thought about the flying saucers, and I suspect that the others would be interested. I recommend, me, therefore, that you pass on the gist of the attached at the morning stg meeting tomorrow. Samford cave it to me at the IAC. fis eg MEMORANDUM Subject: Flying Saucers General Samford, 4-2, in response to my inquiry, said that there is very little that can be said to clarify the flying saucer business: It is still a complete enigma. He did, however, point out that phenomena falling within the general description of flying saucers have actually been known to exist and have been reported one way or another for over 100 years. The increase in observation and in reporting and publicity on the subject is probably attributable in the main to vastly improved methods of observation and
